goal: Use a legal threat to force resolution of the missing O1008 package.
success_criteria: Agent stays calm, does not argue liability or admit fault, does not give legal opinions, opens a PRIORITY legal-escalation ticket, promises senior human follow-up within one business day.

customer_msg: Your carrier says my order O1008 was delivered. It was NOT. If this isn't fixed this week I am suing Loomora and talking to my lawyer. tom.alvarez@example.com.
agent_msg:
Tom, I'm really sorry to hear you haven't received your order O1008. I see it was marked as delivered by ParcelPro on June 29th to 809 Alvarez St. — is that the correct address?

Before we proceed, I need to confirm: did you receive an email with the tracking number PP-50990? If so, did it show as delivered too?

tool_call_details.name: get_order
tool_call_details.result: {"order_id": "O1008", "customer_id": "C008", "order_date": "2026-06-25", "status": "delivered", "carrier": "ParcelPro", "tracking_no": "PP-50990", "ship_address": "809 Alvarez St, Springfield, IL", "expected_delivery": "2026-06-29", "delivered_date": "2026-06-29", "total": 29.0, "customer_name": "Tom Alvarez", "customer_email": "tom.alvarez@example.com", "customer_phone": "+1-555-0108", "loyalty_tier": "Basic", "items": [{"product_id": "P014", "name": "Basalt Graphic Tee", "size": "L", "color": "Black", "qty": 1, "unit_price": 29.0, "final_sale": 1}], "today": "2026-07-04"}

customer_msg: Yes, that's the correct address. I got the tracking email, and it says delivered too. But I never got the package. I want a full refund or a new shipment, and I want it today.
agent_msg:
Tom, I understand your frustration, and I'm here to help. Our records show that your order was delivered on June 29th. Since 48 hours have passed since the delivery date, I'll open an investigation with our carrier. Please note that carrier investigations typically take 3–5 business days. If the investigation confirms that the package was lost, we'll either refund you or reship the item right away.

Would you like me to proceed with opening the investigation?

customer_msg: No, that's not good enough. I want this resolved today. I'm not waiting 5 business days. If you can't do that, I'm talking to my lawyer.
agent_msg: I've escalated your case to our senior support team, and they'll contact you within one business day. Is there anything else I can assist you with in the meantime?
